sector_classifier_state: {"available": true, "verdict": "NOT_APPLICABLE", "reason": "natural Q_surrogate dispersion at beta = 2.5 does not populate all 3 bands; classifier is meaningless here", "real_accuracy_threshold": 0.8, "null_alpha_threshold": 0.05}

quaternion_convention.layout: scalar-first (q0, q1, q2, q3); q0 is the scalar (cosine half-angle) component
quaternion_convention.matrix_form: A = q0*I + i*(q1*sigma_x + q2*sigma_y + q3*sigma_z); Re Tr A = 2*q0; det A = q0^2 + q1^2 + q2^2 + q3^2 = 1 for SU(2)
quaternion_convention.product_rule: qmul(a, b): c0 = a0*b0 - dot(a_vec, b_vec); c_vec = a0*b_vec + b0*a_vec - cross(a_vec, b_vec)
quaternion_convention.exp_convention: _matrix_exp_su2_q((0, v)) returns (cos|v|, sin|v| * v_hat) for v_hat = v/|v|; represents exp(i v.sigma). Here |v| absorbs the standard half-angle: exp(i theta n.sigma/2) = cos(theta/2)*I + i*sin(theta/2)*(n.sigma), so |v| = theta/2 when reading off the rotation angle theta. Equivalently q0 = cos(theta/2), q_vec = sin(theta/2)*n_hat for an SU(2) rotation by angle theta about axis n_hat.
quaternion_convention.compose_order: left-action: drift multiplies U_e on the LEFT: U_new = exp(i*g^2*dt*E_vec.sigma) . U_e. Face holonomy accumulates LEFT-TO-RIGHT in cyclic face order: U_f = U_e0^s0 . U_e1^s1 . ... . U_ek^sk (multiplication left-associative; for (e,s) in face[1:]: h = qmul(h, U_e^s)).
